response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (web, mobile, embedded) but lacks the core requirements for this role. No demonstrated C++ on Windows experience in the last decade (only a brief 7-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. Primary stack is JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — none of which align with the mandatory requirements.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Polyglot experience including some historical C/C++ exposure
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No recent C++ experience; only ~7 months at NI in 2014-2015
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; primarily MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: Lack of recent C++ on Windows experience
No capital markets/fixed income domain experience
